tofugu.description: Japanese language and culture lessons with progressive difficulty
tofugu.progress_tracking: No natural order — articles are independent topics. Select intelligently based on dependencies inferred from content.
tofugu.structure_notes: Navigate via categories/archives. Topics can be standalone or have implicit prerequisites.

yoku_bi.description: Japanese language learning resources and guides
yoku_bi.progress_tracking: No natural order — select based on content relationships and logical progression
yoku_bi.structure_notes: Discover structure on site visit. Track dependencies if discoverable.

tatsumoto.description: Comprehensive structured Japanese learning guide with explicit hierarchy
tatsumoto.progress_tracking: Hierarchical order — follow the table of contents. Respect stated prerequisites.
tatsumoto.structure_notes: Has explicit prerequisite chains in TOC. Always check dependencies before serving an article.

ixrec.description: Comprehensive nested articles on Japanese topics (particles, grammar, etc.)
ixrec.progress_tracking: Large pages with multiple subtopics — select individual topics/sections, not full pages. Track at subtopic level.
ixrec.structure_notes: Example: /all-about-particles has many subtopics. Extract and track individual sections within pages.

imabi.description: Sequential numbered Japanese grammar lessons in progressive order
imabi.progress_tracking: Natural sequential order — articles are numbered. Can follow order or select based on topics.
imabi.structure_notes: Implicit sequential ordering. Consider respecting sequence for coherent learning path.
